title: Minimalist jewellery e-commerce storefront with admin product management

requirements.text: Create a cohesive minimalist luxury UI theme across the app using a clean white + beige palette, elegant serif headings, modern sans-serif body text, generous whitespace, subtle hover states, and smooth micro-animations; ensure the design is mobile-first and fully responsive.

quotes: Clean white and beige color palette
Elegant serif headings with modern sans-serif body text
Smooth animations and subtle hover effects

acceptanceCriteria: All pages share consistent typography (serif headings, sans body), spacing, and color tokens (white/beige).
Layouts adapt correctly on mobile, tablet, and desktop without horizontal scrolling.
Hover/focus/active states are present for interactive elements and are visually subtle (no cluttered UI).

requirements.text: Implement a backend product catalog API in the single Motoko actor: create/read/update/delete jewellery products with fields: id, name/title, description, price, category (Rings/Necklaces/Earrings/Bracelets), images (one or more), createdAt/updatedAt; persist data in stable storage so it survives upgrades.

quotes: Admin can: Upload new jewellery products ... Add price ... Add description ... Select category ... Edit or delete products
Make it scalable so more products can be added without breaking layout

acceptanceCriteria: Backend exposes methods to list products, fetch product by id, create product, update product, and delete product.
Products include category and price and can store multiple image references.
Data remains available after canister upgrade (stable storage used).

requirements.text: Implement admin/seller authentication and authorization using Internet Identity: require login for the Admin Dashboard; restrict product create/update/delete actions to an admin allowlist of principals stored in backend.
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthenticated users cannot access admin routes/screens (they are redirected to a login prompt).
Backend rejects non-admin principals for product mutation calls.
At least one initial admin principal can be configured (e.g., via backend init/default list or an admin-management method guarded by existing admin).

requirements.text: Support product image upload for admins: allow attaching multiple images to a product via the Admin Dashboard and render those images on the storefront. Store uploaded images on the Internet Computer (in-canister) and serve them back to the frontend via a backend HTTP interface or query endpoints; include reasonable file type/size validation and clear error messaging.

quotes: High-quality image display with zoom feature

acceptanceCriteria: Admin can upload at least 1 image per product and see previews before saving.
Backend stores image bytes and returns a stable URL or identifier that the frontend can render in .
Uploading invalid types/sizes shows a user-friendly validation error and does not crash the app.
Storefront product pages successfully display uploaded images.

requirements.text: Build the Homepage UI with: hero banner featuring a large jewellery image, featured products section, category section (Rings/Necklaces/Earrings/Bracelets), testimonials section, Instagram-style gallery preview, and a footer with contact + social links.

quotes: Homepage: Hero banner with large jewellery image
Footer with contact and social links

acceptanceCriteria: Homepage contains all listed sections and remains visually minimalist and responsive.
Featured products are populated from backend product data.
Categories are clickable and navigate to a filtered shop view.

requirements.text: Build the Shop page with a responsive grid layout, category filter (Rings/Necklaces/Earrings/Bracelets), sort by price (ascending/descending), and an Add to cart action per product.
acceptanceCriteria: Products render in a responsive grid with consistent spacing.
Changing category filter updates the grid results.
Sorting by price asc/desc updates ordering deterministically.
Each product card provides an Add to cart control that adds the correct product.

requirements.text: Build the Product Detail page that includes: large image gallery with zoom, product description, price, Add to cart, reviews section UI, and related products section populated from the catalog (e.g., same category).

quotes: Product Page: Large image gallery with zoom

acceptanceCriteria: Product page loads product data by id and renders name/description/price/images.
Image gallery supports zoom interaction on the main image.
Related products render (excluding the current product) and are navigable.
Reviews section is present as UI (can be placeholder if persistence is not implemented in this build).

requirements.text: Implement a Cart page with editable quantities, remove item, and total price calculation; cart state should persist across page refreshes in the browser.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can increment/decrement quantities and see totals update immediately.
Users can remove items from the cart.
Cart contents persist after refresh (e.g., local storage).

requirements.text: Implement a Checkout page with a shipping form (validated inputs) and a payment integration placeholder that is clearly marked as "Stripe ready" without performing real payment processing.
acceptanceCriteria: Shipping form includes basic fields (name, email, address, city, postal code, country) with validation and inline error messages.
Checkout shows an explicit payment placeholder section labeled as Stripe-ready.
Submitting the form without required fields shows validation errors and does not proceed.

requirements.text: Build an Admin Dashboard UI that allows admins to create, edit, and delete products; fields must include title/name, description, price, category selection, and image upload; the dashboard must remain simple, clean, and consistent with the overall minimalist aesthetic.

quotes: Dashboard should be simple and clean
Admin can: Upload new jewellery products ... Edit or delete products

acceptanceCriteria: Admin can view a list/table of products with edit/delete controls.
Admin can create a product and upload images, then see it appear in the Shop/Product pages.
Admin can edit product fields and changes reflect on storefront after refresh.
Admin can delete a product and it no longer appears in storefront lists.

requirements.text: Add performance and UX enhancements: smooth route/section loading states, subtle page/element transitions, image lazy loading for product grids and galleries, and user-friendly error states for failed network calls.

quotes: Smooth animations and subtle hover effects

acceptanceCriteria: Product lists and product detail pages show loading skeletons/spinners while data loads.
Images in grids are lazy-loaded and do not cause layout jumps (use reserved aspect ratio).
Failures to load products or upload images show a clear, minimal error UI with a retry option where applicable.

requirements.text: Add basic SEO/accessibility foundations: per-page document titles and meta descriptions, semantic headings, accessible form labels, keyboard navigable controls, and meaningful alt text for product images (fallback if not provided).
acceptanceCriteria: Each core route sets a distinct title and meta description.
Forms have associated labels and show accessible error messages.
Primary interactions are reachable via keyboard and have visible focus styling.
Product images include alt text derived from product title when not explicitly provided.

requirements.text: Provide a production-ready project structure and an in-repo README that explains local development, building, deploying to the Internet Computer, and how to configure the initial admin principal(s).
acceptanceCriteria: README contains steps to run locally, deploy, and set/administer admin principal(s).
README describes how product images are stored/served and any size limitations.
Project structure separates backend logic, frontend pages/components, and shared types cleanly.

constraints: Backend must be implemented in a single Motoko actor (no additional backend services).
Do not use Next.js, Supabase, Firebase, or external databases/cloud storage; implement persistence in the Motoko canister using stable storage.
Authentication must use Internet Identity (no third-party auth providers).
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui or other frontend immutable paths specified by the platform; only compose/reuse those components.
No real Stripe integration in this build—checkout must be a placeholder only.
nonGoals: Implementing real payment processing or order settlement.
Integrations with external social media APIs (Instagram API) beyond a static gallery-style preview UI.

required: Minimalist jewellery brand wordmark logo in black on transparent background (logo-wordmark.dim_512x256.png)
Soft luxury hero banner photo-style image of jewellery on beige/white background with ample whitespace (hero-banner.dim_2400x1200.png)
Set of four minimalist category tiles/icons for Rings, Necklaces, Earrings, Bracelets in neutral beige/black line style (category-icons-set.dim_1024x256.png)
